login.title: Sign In
login.dashboardSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access the dashboard
login.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

portalLogin.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access the client portal
portalLogin.tagline: Track your projects, browse files, and stay in touch with the team
portalLogin.loginError: An error occurred while signing in

forgot.title: Recover Password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we will send you a password reset link
forgot.sentDetail: If this email is registered with us, you will receive a message containing a password reset link.
forgot.requestError: An error occurred while sending the request

reset.title: Reset Password
reset.subtitle: Enter the new password for your account
reset.minLength: Password must be at least {min} characters
reset.missingToken: Reset token is missing. Please use the link sent to your email.
reset.redirecting: Redirecting you to the sign-in page...
reset.resetError: An error occurred while resetting the password

api.rateLimitMinutes: Too many attempts. Try again in {retry} minutes
api.resetLinkSent: A password reset link has been sent to your email
api.tokenInvalidOrExpired: Reset token is invalid or expired
api.accountDisabled: Your account has been disabled. Please contact support
api.resetUnsupported: Your account does not support password reset via this link. Please contact support
api.updateFailed: Failed to update the password. Please try again
api.resetSuccess: Password reset successfully. Please sign in with your new password
